corrections.note: Acute accent on αἴνε is wrong in transcript.

corrections.location: v. 10, speech of Tobit to Raphael
corrections.current: Ἀζαρία ἀδελφέ, λάλησον ὑπὲρ ὧν ἔλεγες ἐν τῇ πορείᾳ
corrections.correct: Ἀζαρία ἀδελφέ, λάλησον ὑπὲρ ὧν ἔλεγες ἐν τῇ πορείᾳ
corrections.note: Imperative printed with acute on first alpha: λάλησον.
Transcript omitted the following words before continuing with νῦν ἔχων ἡδέως γίνου.

corrections.location: v. 11, final clause of Tobit's reply
corrections.current: ἕως ἂν στήσητε καὶ σταθῆτε πρὸς μέ.
corrections.correct: ἕως ἂν στήσητε καὶ σταθῆτε πρὸς μέ. καὶ εἶπεν Ῥαγουὴλ
corrections.note: The next clause is present in the image and omitted before the following line begins with Κομίζου.

corrections.current: Κομίζου αὐτὴν ἀπὸ τοῦ νῦν κατὰ τὴν κρίσιν· σὺ δὲ ἀδελφὸς
corrections.correct: Κομίζου αὐτὴν ἀπὸ τοῦ νῦν κατὰ τὴν κρίσιν· σὺ δὲ ἀδελφὸς
corrections.note: Printed form is Κομίζου, not capitalized as a sentence start after omitted clause? No change to wording; included here only to note body ends correctly at page break.
No correction needed to lemma; included?
Transcript misread sigla and omitted accent: printed reading is Τωβίας BᵇA.
Printed sigla are BᵇA, not ΒΒΑ.
The apparatus reads απεθνησκουσαν, not απεθνησκον; siglum also BᵇA.
Printed variant is εχων, not εχον; superscript siglum formatting also differs.
Accent on βίας and Latin/superscript sigla formatting in print.

uncertain.note: The printed text appears to read νῦν ἔχων ἡδέως γίνου; transcript has this correctly, but accenting on νῦν/ἔχων is small. No correction proposed.
Superscript on B is small; appears to be BᵃbA or similar. Main textual correction is εχων.

notes: Running head matches. Body is mostly correct but omits a short phrase in v. 11 and one following clause before Κομίζου. Apparatus has several siglum-format misreadings and one substantive variant misread (απεθνησκουσαν).
